April Historical Trends & Predictions Mixed | NO | LOW confidence**  
Past Aprils show XRP volatility (e.g., +180% in 2021, -20% in 2024, +4.87% in 2025); Polymarket odds favor XRP below $1.2 (69%) over above $1.4 (56%), Solana above $80 (87%).[1][4][5]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts Amid Oil Shock Volatility | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

South Korea's annual CPI inflation increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January-February, missing market expectations of 2.4% and aligning with the Bank of Korea's 2% target despite global energy pressures from the Iran conflict.[1][2] Monthly CPI rose 0.3-0.34%,
